overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a stationary view looking down a massive vertical cylindrical shaft lined with neon advertisements and illuminated walkways. Two glowing characters tumble through the center of the shaft while corporate signage for Kiroshi and Militech illuminate the dark metallic walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical cylindrical megastructure shaft with neon-lit walkways and corporate advertisements

agents.ego_description: stationary observation from a high vantage point looking down into the neon-lit shaft as characters fall

notable_agents.action: tumbling downward through the shaft with red-orange neon glow
falling downward through the shaft with blue neon glow, slightly below the red character

entered.detail: red neon corporate signage mounted on the left wall of the shaft
vertical yellow illuminated text signage running down the right wall
large white circular logo with three dots, positioned close to camera on left
metal walkway with yellow safety railings and illuminated floor panels on left side
metal walkway with yellow safety railings and illuminated floor panels on right side
circular patterned floor or structure at the bottom of the shaft with concentric illuminated rings

segments.scene_description: The camera maintains a steady high-angle view looking down a massive cylindrical shaft lined with neon corporate advertisements and illuminated walkways. Two characters glowing with red and blue light tumble through the central void, falling past the multi-level metal platforms. The environment is bathed in artificial neon light from the Kiroshi and Militech signage, creating a dark cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady high-angle perspective looking down a massive cylindrical shaft that serves as a neon-lit void of corporate architecture. It begins with a plunging view into the depths of the metallic structure, where the environment is defined by the stark contrast of dark steel and artificial light. As the camera tracks the descent, two characters glowing with red and blue light tumble through the central void, falling past a series of multi-level metal platforms. The scene is continuously bathed in the flickering radiance of Kiroshi and Militech signage, which casts vibrant hues across the illuminated walkways and industrial walls.
